checked_paths: all audited dependency repos searched for the listed symbols
checked_queries: ExecutorRegistered ExecutorUpdated teeType workloadId capability publicKey
negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: No local audited repo decodes ExecutorRegistered/ExecutorUpdated logs as indexed paymentAddress/teeAddress topics plus non-indexed teeType, workloadId, capability, and dynamic publicKey fields into the in-memory registry.
related_but_insufficient_code: ritual-spc-verification/src/types.rs still defines ExecutorRegistry and deactivate_executor, but it is only an in-memory map and has no log-watching service.
ritual-tee-registry-reader reads TEEServiceRegistry storage via TEE_SERVICE_REGISTRY_CONTRACT_ADDRESS; it does not decode ExecutorRegistry event logs.

ritual-reth-nodebuilder-internal/crates/node/src/executor.rs syncs registry state from storage before execution but uses TEE_SERVICE_REGISTRY_CONTRACT_ADDRESS and read_all_executors, not ExecutorRegistry event receipts.

notes: Confirmed by exact event-symbol searches across all audited local repos; the current local architecture reads registry storage instead of consuming ExecutorRegistry event logs.
rationale: The commit body says it handles the new ExecutorRegistered event structure and applies the same fix to ExecutorUpdated; the diff decodes these fields manually and passes payment address, public key, tee address, capability, tee type, and workload ID into ExecutorInfo::new before registering it. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: ExecutorRegistered and ExecutorUpdated logs are decoded as indexed paymentAddress and teeAddress topics plus non-indexed teeType, workloadId, capability, and dynamic publicKey fields, and those decoded values populate the in-memory ExecutorRegistry entry.
suggested_falsification_tests: Build ABI-encoded ExecutorRegistered and ExecutorUpdated logs with paymentAddress, teeAddress, teeType, workloadId, capability, and publicKey, pass them to the service handlers, and assert the registry entry stores exactly those decoded values.
summary: New ExecutorRegistry event payload decoding is absent.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Feed a valid new registry event and assert no local log handler updates the in-memory registry.
title: Executor events decode new registry payload
